type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: First year of NPRI reporting for this facility under new ownership. The facility data (eg kiln production, fuel volumes etc) for 2021 was not available to determine the reasons for the change other than it decreased in 2022 compared to what was reported in 2021.   Previous owner used engineering estimates as the methodology to estimate NO2 releases which is a different methodology that could have contributed to the changes in emissions.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: First year of NPRI reporting for this facility under new ownership. The facility data (eg kiln production, fuel volumes etc) for 2021 was not available to determine the reasons for the change other than it decreased in 2022 compared to what was reported in 2021.   Previous owner used engineering estimates as the methodology to estimate CO releases which is a different methodology that could have contributed to the changes in emissions. Even though CO was estimated to be below its reporting threshold of 20t for 2022 it is being reported voluntarily to show the change from 2021.

type.fr: Commentaire sur l'élimination

comments.comment: This substance was not disposed of but was released to the air as a by-product of drying lumber.

type.fr: Commentaire sur le recyclage

comments.comment: This substance is not recycled.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: First year of NPRI reporting for this facility under new ownership. The facility data (eg kiln production) for 2021 was not available to determine the reasons for the change other than it increased in 2022 compared to 2021.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: First year of NPRI reporting for this facility under new ownership. It appears previous owner had included Fugitive Releases as a source of releases to air and estimated it by using engineering estimates which is a different methodology.  There is no known data or methodology readily available to determine that under new owner.  The exclusion of Fugitive Releases for 2022 has decreased the total emissions significantly.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: First year of NPRI reporting for this facility under new ownership. type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: This is the first year of NPRI reporting for this facility under new ownership.  Previous owner used engineering estimates as the methodology to estimate VOC releases which is a different methodology that could have contributed to the changes in emissions. However, the estimated VOC emissions for 2022 was fairly close to the 2021 emissions.
